rulings.Case Title: PARTNERS VI FRANK OWNER, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. MAX'S ON THE SQUARE, INC., A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2011, line 1. Defendant Max's on the Square, Inc.'s amended demurrer to complaint. Overruled. 5 days to answer. Other action stayed re judge Kahn's order. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AURORA LOAN SERVICES,LLC VS. JOSE CARLOS HERNANDEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 7, 2011, line 2. Defendant Mario Pizarro's demurrer to complaint. Sustained with 5 days leave to amend to allege capacity of the named and intervening defendants. (501/REQ)
